svg.title: Binary digits in terminal monospace
svg.desc: Two rows of binary digits: 01010 on top and 10101 below, rendered in a terminal-style monospace font.

g.style: fill:rgb(250, 249, 245);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "IBM Plex Mono", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;font-size:120px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

text.style: fill:rgb(250, 249, 245);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "IBM Plex Mono", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;font-size:120px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

fill:rgb(250, 249, 245);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "IBM Plex Mono", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;font-size:120px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
